seoBlock.title: AI Music Generator for Creators
seoBlock.p1: Calyra AI is an AI song generator and AI music generator designed to help creators turn prompts, lyrics, and song ideas into complete tracks. Instead of starting from a blank music project, you can describe the sound you want, choose a style, and generate music with vocals and instruments. Use Calyra AI as an AI song maker when you have a simple idea, a text to song AI tool when you want to describe a mood, or a lyrics to song AI workflow when you already have words.
seoBlock.p2: Popular use cases include AI rap songs, anime openings, phonk tracks, lo-fi background music, EDM drops, emotional piano ballads, and pop songs for social content. Creators can make AI songs for YouTube videos, TikTok, Shorts, podcasts, games, ads, and personal creative projects. Subscribers can download generated songs and use them commercially, subject to our terms.

faq.title: Questions Before You Generate
faq.q1: What is an AI song generator?
faq.a1: An AI song generator creates songs from prompts, lyrics, moods, and style descriptions. Calyra AI helps you generate music with vocals and instruments without traditional production skills.
faq.q2: How do I make a song with AI?
faq.a2: Enter a prompt that describes the genre, mood, story, lyrics, vocal style, and use case. You can also start from a template or use a song example as inspiration.
faq.q3: Can I turn lyrics into a song with AI?
faq.a3: Yes. Paste your lyrics and describe the arrangement, tempo, mood, and vocal direction. Calyra AI can help turn lyrics into a song direction with vocals and instruments.
faq.q4: Is Calyra AI a free AI song maker?
faq.a4: You can start testing song ideas for free. More generations, monthly song credits, downloads, and commercial use rights are available through paid plans or one-time credit packs.
faq.q5: Can I use AI-generated songs commercially?
faq.a5: Subscribers can download generated songs and use them commercially for content, commercial projects, and music distribution, subject to the latest terms.
faq.q6: Can I generate songs with vocals?
faq.a6: Yes. Calyra AI is positioned for full song generation, including vocal-style songs and instrumental arrangements depending on the prompt and generation mode.
faq.q7: Can I create music for YouTube or TikTok?
faq.a7: Yes. You can generate hooks, background music, intros, theme songs, and full songs for YouTube, TikTok, Shorts, podcasts, and social media content.

faq.title: Perguntas frequentes
faq.q1: Quantos creditos custa gerar musicas? Vale a pena?
faq.a1: Cada geracao consome 200 creditos e retorna 2 musicas. Isso da uma media de 100 creditos por musica, facilitando comparar versoes e escolher o melhor resultado mais rapido.
faq.q2: O pagamento e seguro? Tenho receio de risco no pagamento.
faq.a2: Sim, totalmente. Usamos canais de pagamento consolidados com criptografia de nivel bancario e controles de risco. Seus dados de pagamento sao processados diretamente pela plataforma de pagamento, e nao podemos ver nem armazenar seus dados completos.
faq.q3: Como funciona a cobranca da assinatura? Posso esquecer da renovacao?
faq.a3: Temos dois planos: Basic e Pro, com cobranca mensal ou anual. O plano mensal renova automaticamente todo mes, o anual renova automaticamente todo ano, e a primeira cobranca ocorre na data da compra.
faq.q4: Quais direitos autorais/comerciais eu recebo ao assinar?
faq.a4: Assinantes podem baixar todas as musicas geradas e recebem direitos completos de uso comercial, incluindo publicacao de conteudo, projetos comerciais e distribuicao em plataformas musicais.
faq.q5: Quantas geracoes gratis usuarios gratuitos recebem por dia?
faq.a5: A cada 24 horas, voce recebe 1-2 geracoes gratis, com producao total de 2-4 musicas. A janela e movel: quando os usos acabam, o proximo reset e calculado a partir daquele momento exato.
faq.q6: Por quanto tempo as musicas ficam salvas? Elas podem ser removidas?
faq.a6: Regra atual: musicas de usuarios gratuitos ficam salvas por 30 dias. Musicas geradas durante uma assinatura Basic ou Pro ativa ficam salvas por longo prazo. Se voce precisa de acervo de longo prazo, um plano superior e recomendado.

pricingPage.subscribeNowCancelAnytime: Assine agora - cancele a qualquer momento.

common.contactBody: For questions about these policies or your account, contact support from your dashboard or reach out through our support channel.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Hit-Song
seo.description: How Hit-Song collects, uses, and protects personal data for account, payment, and AI song creation workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This policy explains what data Hit-Song handles, why we handle it, and the choices you have.

sections.title: Data we collect
body: We collect account identifiers such as email and authentication data, song creation inputs such as stories and prompts, generation outputs such as lyrics and audio metadata, and billing records needed to process purchases.
bullets: Account data: email, auth provider identifiers, profile basics
Creation data: story text, style selections, generated lyrics/audio references
Usage data: logs, device/browser metadata, anti-abuse signals
Billing data: transaction references from payment processors

sections.title: How we use data
body: We use data to operate core product flows, deliver purchased services, prevent abuse, improve reliability, and communicate important account or policy updates.
bullets: Run lyric, audio, and report generation workflows
Store and serve your songs and public share pages
Process credits, subscriptions, and refunds
Investigate incidents and maintain security

sections.title: Third-party services
body: Hit-Song relies on selected infrastructure and model providers to deliver the service. These providers process only the data required for their function under applicable agreements.
bullets: Hosting and database services
Payment processing services
Email and notification services
AI generation providers for lyrics, audio, and analysis

sections.title: Retention and your choices
body: We retain data for as long as needed to provide the service, meet legal obligations, and resolve disputes. You can request deletion of your account data subject to operational and legal constraints.
bullets: You may delete songs and account data from product surfaces where available
Backups and legal records may persist for limited periods
Public song pages remain public until you change visibility or remove them

seo.title: Terms of Service | Hit-Song
seo.description: Terms governing use of Hit-Song, including account responsibilities, generated content, credits, subscriptions, and limitations.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: By using Hit-Song, you agree to these terms for account access, AI generation, and paid features.

sections.title: Service scope
body: Hit-Song provides tools to transform user prompts into lyrics, audio, and creator-style reports. Features can change over time and may vary by plan or region.

sections.title: Accounts and acceptable use
body: You are responsible for activity under your account and for complying with law and platform policies.
bullets: Do not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or automate abuse
Do not upload unlawful, infringing, or harmful content
Keep account credentials secure and accurate

sections.title: Content and intellectual property
body: You retain rights to the inputs you submit. Subject to applicable law and these terms, you may use outputs generated for your account. Hit-Song and its licensors retain rights in the platform, models, and infrastructure.

sections.title: Payments, credits, and refunds
body: Paid features include credit packs and subscriptions. Charges are processed by our payment providers. Refund eligibility is governed by our Refund Policy.
bullets: Credits are consumed by eligible generation actions
Subscription access and benefits follow the active billing period
Refund requests are reviewed under stated policy conditions

sections.title: Disclaimers and limitation
body: The service is provided on an as-available basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or specific creative outcomes. To the maximum extent permitted by law, liability is limited to amounts paid for the relevant service period.

seo.title: Refund Policy | Hit-Song
seo.description: Refund eligibility, timelines, and process for Hit-Song credit purchases and subscriptions.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: This policy explains when refunds are available and how to request one.

sections.title: Eligibility
body: Refunds are available for unused credits requested within 7 days of purchase.
bullets: Request must be submitted within 7 calendar days
Credits tied to the request must be unused
The purchase must be made through an official Hit-Song checkout flow

sections.title: Non-refundable cases
body: Refunds are generally not available for credits that have been used, expired windows, or abuse-related account restrictions.
bullets: Partially or fully consumed credits
Requests beyond the 7-day window
Fraud, chargeback abuse, or policy violations

sections.title: How to request a refund
body: Contact support with your account email, order identifier, and reason for the request. We may ask for additional verification to protect account security.
bullets: Include order ID and purchase date
Use the same account email used for purchase
Allow support time to verify credit usage status

sections.title: Processing timeline
body: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method. Processing time depends on your payment provider and card network.
bullets: Policy review: typically within 3 business days
Payment reversal: usually 5-10 business days after approval
